items.text: Inspect current video editor implementation, confirm relevant files, and verify repo state before editing
Implement independent fixes: slider, Remotion license, unused track counting, editor-pane overlay, render toast, duplicate-query diagnosis, assets-panel verification
Implement editor interaction polish: overlay drag preview, condensed timeline controls, timeline maximize toggle, drag feedback, external file drop fix
Run build/tests and capture finalize.json checkpoints plus final execution summary

property sliders so the video-editor slider API is consistent at runtime. The project build completed cleanly with the prop in place.","files_changed":["src/tools/video-editor/components/PreviewPanel/RemotionPreview.tsx"],"commands_run":["npm run build"]},{"task_id":"T3","status":"done","executor_notes":"Unused-track counting now ignores the default V1/A1 tracks and clear-unused preserves them explicitly before considering fallback empty-track retention. This matches the empty-default-track edge case the plan called out.","files_changed":["src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineTrackManagement.ts"],"commands_run":["npm run build"]},{"task_id":"T4","status":"done","executor_notes":"LayoutMainContent now only adds top padding when the editor pane is locked, so hover-open behaves as an overlay while locked mode still reserves space. Added a focused regression test for the hover-open case.","files_changed":["src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.tsx","src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.test.tsx"],"commands_run":["npm run build","npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/shared/components/ui/slider.test.tsx src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.test.tsx src/shared/lib/__tests__/dragDrop.test.ts"]},{"task_id":"T5","status":"done","executor_notes":"Kept drag updates local to OverlayEditor: the dragged overlay now renders its own lightweight preview while an opaque mask covers the original Remotion position, so text and image overlays visually follow the cursor without re-materializing the timeline on every mousemove.","files_changed":["src/tools/video-editor/components/PreviewPanel/PreviewPanel.tsx","src/tools/video-editor/components/PreviewPanel/OverlayEditor.tsx"],"commands_run":["npm run build"]},{"task_id":"T6","status":"done","executor_notes":"Merged track management, clear-unused, zoom, and the resize affordance into the divider strip so the standalone toolbar row is gone. The resize handler stays attached only to the center handle, which preserves divider dragging while buttons remain clickable.","files_changed":["src/tools/video-editor/components/VideoEditorShell.tsx"],"commands_run":["npm run build"]},{"task_id":"T7","status":"done","executor_notes":"Added a dedicated maximize toggle that snaps the preview to the configured minimum height and restores the prior split when toggled off. Manual divider dragging automatically exits maximize mode, so the two layout controls do not fight each other.","files_changed":["src/tools/video-editor/components/VideoEditorShell.tsx"],"commands_run":["npm run build"]},{"task_id":"T8","status":"done","executor_notes":"Left rendering disabled per the approved plan and changed the user feedback from an error toast to an informational message that explicitly frames the limitation as pending server-side work.","files_changed":["src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineData.ts"],"commands_run":["npm run build"]},{"task_id":"T9","status":"done","executor_notes":"Added explicit timeline drag feedback for horizontal clip moves: the dragged clip now gets a brighter active state plus a projected ghost, center line, and row label that track the target slot. Existing cross-track ghost/highlight behavior remains intact.","files_changed":["src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineEditor.tsx","src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/timeline-overrides.css"],"commands_run":["npm run build"]},{"task_id":"T10","status":"done","executor_notes":"Reused the existing skeleton placeholder flow but changed dropped external images to follow the generation pipeline: upload the image to the normal media storage path, create a generation record plus primary variant, register that generation as a timeline asset, then add the clip. Non-image files keep the existing timeline-bucket upload path.","files_changed":["src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineEditing.ts"],"commands_run":["npm run build"]},{"task_id":"T11","status":"done","executor_notes":"Verified in code that PropertiesPanel already initializes assetsExpanded to false, so no repo changes were needed for this item.","files_changed":[],"commands_run":[]},{"task_id":"T12","status":"done","executor_notes":"The duplicate-query warning was not caused by coexisting editor providers. The actual issue was AssetPanel building useQueries entries with repeated generation IDs, which TanStack warns about. Deduplicating the query list removes the warning while still mapping each asset back to its shared query result.","files_changed":["src/tools/video-editor/components/PropertiesPanel/AssetPanel.tsx"],"commands_run":["npm run build"]},{"task_id":"T13","status":"done","executor_notes":"Ran a full production build and targeted regression tests for the touched shared components. I did not run the repository-wide npm test suite, so verification covers the build plus focused tests rather than every existing test file.","files_changed":[],"commands_run":["npm run build","npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/shared/components/ui/slider.test.tsx src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.test.tsx src/shared/lib/__tests__/dragDrop.test.ts"]}],"sense_check_acknowledgments":[{"sense_check_id":"SC1","executor_note":"Verified by normalizing Slider to emit a scalar value and updating CompactPreview to consume that scalar. Build passed and the shared slider tests still pass."},{"sense_check_id":"SC2","executor_note":"Confirmed from node_modules/@remotion/player/dist/cjs/Player.d.ts that acknowledgeRemotionLicense is a valid prop, then wired it into RemotionPreview."},{"sense_check_id":"SC3","executor_note":"The counting logic now excludes DEFAULT_VIDEO_TRACKS and clear-unused keeps those IDs unconditionally, so empty V1/A1 no longer contribute to the count."},{"sense_check_id":"SC4","executor_note":"Added a focused LayoutMainContent test covering the hover-open editor pane case and it now keeps paddingTop at 0px unless the pane is locked."},{"sense_check_id":"SC5","executor_note":"Overlay drag remains local-state-only. The dragged overlay now paints its own preview while a mask covers the stale Remotion position, which resolves the visual stickiness without per-mousemove timeline commits."},{"sense_check_id":"SC6","executor_note":"Controls now live in the divider strip and the resize handler is bound only to the center handle element, so button clicks do not trigger panel resizing."},{"sense_check_id":"SC7","executor_note":"The maximize toggle switches gridTemplateRows to a minimum-height preview layout and toggling off falls back to the prior split logic; divider drags clear maximize mode."},{"sense_check_id":"SC8","executor_note":"startRender now raises an informational toast message instead of an error and keeps the render infrastructure dormant for future server-side work."},{"sense_check_id":"SC9","executor_note":"TimelineEditor now renders an explicit ghost, center line, and row label during horizontal clip drags; cross-track drag feedback continues to come from the existing ghost/highlight path."},{"sense_check_id":"SC10","executor_note":"Dropped external images now follow a generation-backed upload flow before being added to the timeline, while the existing uploading-* skeleton placeholder remains in place until the async work resolves."},{"sense_check_id":"SC11","executor_note":"Verified existing code only: PropertiesPanel initializes assetsExpanded with useState(false)."},{"sense_check_id":"SC12","executor_note":"Investigated the warning path and fixed the real cause by deduplicating repeated generation-lightbox queries in AssetPanel rather than changing provider mounting behavior."},{"sense_check_id":"SC13","executor_note":"npm run build passed and the targeted vitest run passed. The full repository-wide npm test suite was not run in this execution pass."}]}

items.text: Inspect current video editor implementation, confirm relevant files, and verify repo state before editing
Implement independent fixes: slider, Remotion license, unused track counting, editor-pane overlay, render toast, duplicate-query diagnosis, assets-panel verification
Implement editor interaction polish: overlay drag preview, condensed timeline controls, timeline maximize toggle, drag feedback, external file drop fix
Run build/tests and capture finalize.json checkpoints plus final execution summary
